description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI Tests that runs on pull request opened, edited, synchronize, and ready_for_review events. The workflow consists of four jobs: pre-commit, build-gem5, unittests-all-opt, and testlib-quick. The pre-commit job checks out the code and uses pre-commit/action. The build-gem5 job builds gem5 on a self-hosted Linux runner, uploads the artifact, and outputs the artifact name. The unittests-all-opt job runs unittests on a self-hosted Linux runner. The testlib-quick job downloads the gem5 artifact, runs tests, creates a zip of results, and uploads it.
